entry.title: New: CR 24-118 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 157, CD1 (2024), to grant the Department of Public Works the authority to prohibit activities that may pollute stormwater discharges and certain non-stormwater discharges from entering the County’s storm drainage system.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
